questions.question: SH ads are at 0.84x ROAS (losing money) while FKI ads are at 15x ROAS. How should we reallocate budget this week?

options.A: Pause SH ads entirely, move 100% to FKI
options.B: Keep SH at 20% budget, scale FKI with remaining 80%
options.C: Give SH 2 more weeks to optimize before cutting
options.D: Cut SH to $500/day minimum, scale FKI aggressively

questions.rationale: Minimum spend keeps SH data flowing while FKI compounds at 15x
questions.advaita_alignment: Lead Acquisition domain — CPL self-optimizes via budget allocation

questions.question: 1,017 leads are incorrectly assigned to Bailey (human) instead of Piper (AI). What priority should resolving this be?

options.A: P0 — fix today, re-route all leads to Piper immediately
options.B: P1 — fix this week, assign Piper GHL user ID first
options.C: P2 — fix next sprint, document for Leo
options.D: Leave it — Bailey can handle these manually

questions.rationale: Needs Piper GHL user ID first (Bennett gate) before mass reassignment
questions.advaita_alignment: Lead Processing — every opt-in routed without human touch

questions.question: Tiffany (Ollama server) has been unreachable for 24h+ affecting lead scoring. What's the contingency?

options.A: Route all scoring to Claude API (Anthropic) as fallback permanently
options.B: Fix Tiffany first, then restore Ollama as primary
options.C: Run scoring on iMac locally using Ollama, keep Tiffany for other tasks
options.D: Pause pipeline until Tiffany is back online

questions.rationale: Claude API scoring via appointment-setter is already live on :8743 — leverage it
questions.advaita_alignment: Operations — zero human touch in scoring pipeline

questions.question: QuickBooks shows $40K checking and $253K in CC debt. What financial priority should Fred track daily?

options.A: CC debt paydown velocity — flag if not decreasing week-over-week
options.B: Cash runway — alert if checking drops below $25K
options.C: Both: CC velocity + cash floor with weekly P&L vs actuals
options.D: Revenue first — focus Fred on income tracking, not debt

questions.rationale: Two metrics together give full picture — either alone misses the other risk
questions.advaita_alignment: Financial Control — no surprises, every dollar tracked

questions.question: What should Angie prioritize auditing most deeply in her next weekly cycle?

options.A: Skills freshness — 126 skills, many may be stale or stub-only
options.B: Agent diamond rates — Leo/Ivan/Mack completion velocity
options.C: Project velocity — Sprint Board Yellow tasks older than 72h
options.D: Financial projections — Fred accuracy vs actuals

questions.rationale: 126 skills with no systematic freshness check is the biggest silent drift risk
questions.advaita_alignment: Operations — agents self-improve via skill quality enforcement
